policy: permit(principal, action, resource) when { datetime("2025-04-25T00:00:00+00:00") < datetime("2030-01-01T00:00:00Z") };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { datetime("2025-04-25T00:00:00+0000") < datetime("2030-01-01T00:00:00Z") };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { datetime("2025-04-25T00:00:00.1234Z") < datetime("2030-01-01T00:00:00Z") };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { datetime("2025-04-25T00:00:00.123456Z") < datetime("2030-01-01T00:00:00Z") };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { datetime("2025-04-25T00:00:00.123Z") < datetime("2030-01-01T00:00:00Z") };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { datetime("2025-04-25T00:00:00-0500") < datetime("2030-01-01T00:00:00Z") };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { datetime("2025-04-25T00:00:00-05:00") < datetime("2030-01-01T00:00:00Z") };
